shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The meter shelf size matches the lower center HUD slot from the GDD.
differences: Eight fill segments step from gold to warning orange.
A center notch keeps zero deviation visible at a glance.
Mud brackets tie the meter to the farm machinery theme.

context.usage: Lower-center readout for live deviation and warning thresholds.

specs.texture: Dark slate housing with gold slots and cream tick marks.
specs.shading: Flat housing with one bright top ridge.

acceptance_criteria: Meter housing size is exactly 400x60px with 8 evenly spaced fill segments.
The center notch sits on the exact horizontal midpoint.
All edges stay inside a 1px outline rhythm.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle housing with child fill bars.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_balance_meter_400x60.png and spawn child fill bars from code.
runtime_notes: Keep the housing static while code drives the fill state.
Snap all tick marks to whole pixels.
Reserve a transparent outer gutter for popup overlap.
